_protocolNameSemantics: generatedTextDesc covers generated source-code text and generated document text, such as c/cxx source files and md document files.

_summarySemantics.totalCodeLines: Count all non-blank added ('+') code lines in the commit diff, including manual/human-written lines that may be omitted from DETAIL. Do not include deleted or blank lines.
_summarySemantics.fullGeneratedCodeLines: Subset of added code lines whose genRatio is 100.
_summarySemantics.partialGeneratedCodeLines: Subset of added code lines whose genRatio is greater than 0 and less than 100.
_summarySemantics.generatedCodeLineInvariant: totalCodeLines >= fullGeneratedCodeLines + partialGeneratedCodeLines. The difference is manual/unattributed code lines with effective genRatio=0.
_summarySemantics.generatedDocLineInvariant: totalDocLines >= fullGeneratedDocLines + partialGeneratedDocLines. The difference is manual/unattributed document lines with effective genRatio=0.

_detailSemantics.model: SPARSE SNAPSHOT - DETAIL records AI-attributed lines (genRatio > 0). Manual/unattributed lines with effective genRatio=0 may be omitted.
_detailSemantics.omittedManualLine: If a live added line is counted by SUMMARY.totalCodeLines but has no matching lineLocation or lineRange in DETAIL, consumers treat it as genRatio=0 for metrics and may label it Manual/Unattributed if they materialize the omitted line.
_detailSemantics.lineLocation: A 1-based line number in the file content after REPOSITORY.revisionId has been applied.
_detailSemantics.lineRange: A lineRange represents every 1-based line number N where from <= N <= to, and every line in the range shares the same genRatio and genMethod.
